The People

Our Healers
& Therapists

Taking your awareness to the next level.

Healers & Therapists

Awareness Coach

Isabelle Peeters

Isabelle holds a law degree and MBA. Two years after setting up her legal solutions firm, a progressed form of Lyme disease called her to a halt. Years of conventional medicine made her completely bedridden. She recovered through organic food, biological medicine, energy healing, and meditation. Her passion is helping people grow in awareness and understand their own power.

Energy Healing

Daniela Nikolova

Daniela is an energy healer and integrative nutrition health coach. Following an autoimmune diagnosis, she explored many healing modalities and fully recovered through energy healing. She now helps clients achieve balance, awareness, and alignment on all levels — physical, mental, emotional, and spiritual.

Nutritional Healing

Dave De Belder

Trained under renowned chefs including Jonnie Boer and Ferran & Albert Adrià. Dave opened multiple Michelin-rated restaurants in Belgium and Australia. In 2015 he needed a radical change and moved to Ibiza. He now teaches the transformative impact of organic, local food on the body, mind, and soul.

"Each healer on board brings a piece of the journey that no temple or sunset can offer — the journey within."
